esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-rabbitmqreceiver.otel-default
// Memory alarm: when triggered (1), producers are blocked
// Requires node-level metrics enabled in receiver config
| WHERE metrics.rabbitmq.node.mem_alarm IS NOT NULL
  AND metrics.rabbitmq.node.mem_alarm > 0
| STATS alarm_count = COUNT(*)
  BY resource.attributes.rabbitmq.node.name
| WHERE alarm_count > 0
